title: Qing Yi
content:
Appearance
[
]

She was about in her twenties with black hair like a waterfall. Although she wasn’t an absolute beauty, she gave of a very refreshing feeling.

Overview
[
]

Qing Yi shares a deep and affectionate bond with 
Wang Ping
. Their relationship develops gradually, with Qing Yi willingly accompanying him through hardship and uncertainty.

Wang Ping, in turn, shows her great tenderness and affection, and their connection eventually matures into a lifelong companionship. Out of devotion, Qing Yi chooses to 
age alongside Wang Ping
, wishing to share his mortal years rather than seek immortality alone.

Throughout her life, Qing Yi faces numerous challenges — including being expelled from the Sun family and captured by others. Nevertheless, 
Wang Lin
 supports her and vows to help her reach the 
Nascent Soul stage
.

With Wang Ping’s protection and Wang Lin’s guidance, Qing Yi continues her cultivation journey, overcoming adversity through perseverance and love.

After years of struggle, Qing Yi grows older yet retains her gentle and sentimental nature. She values 
emotion and companionship
 over ruthless ambition, expressing a desire to remain “a person of feeling” rather than a cold and detached celestial.

Her story concludes peacefully — she and Wang Ping settle in a quiet 
mountain village
, living out their remaining years together in serenity and mutual affection.
